1.0.0.name: aube-test-jail-network
1.0.0.description: Fixture package whose postinstall verifies the build jail denies network sockets.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const net=require('net'); const s=net.connect({host:'1.1.1.1',port:80}); const t=setTimeout(()=>process.exit(44),1000); s.on('connect',()=>process.exit(45)); s.on('error',e=>{clearTimeout(t); process.exit(e.code==='EPERM'||e.code==='EACCES'?0:46)})"
